readme: Expected-decision key for the Phase 6 bounded decision points (agency v1.0.0).
AUTHORSHIP. This key is DOMAIN-AUTHORED: every expected outcome below is
derived from (a) the scenario facts the generator plants and (b) the
published decision policy in docs/agency-methodology.md -- and each
subject's 'basis' entries record that derivation. A live run of the
implementation was used only to CONFIRM the derived values afterwards,
never as their source: an eval whose key is copied from the system under
test measures nothing.
WHY THIS KEY IS COMMITTED RATHER THAN GENERATED. Decision outcomes are a
function of POLICY (the agency thresholds, the Critic's rubric bar, the
advisory corroboration gate and rank key), which the scenario generator
must not know about -- the generator emits facts; the evals own policy
expectations (the same split as tests/data/sar_rubric_gold.json). The
generator and data/synthetic/ground_truth.json are untouched by Phase 6,
so the byte-determinism guards over them are unaffected.
SCOPE. hop_cap=2 is the run_case default the eval runs under. The
'recidivism_surfaced' field is authored here for stability but is asserted
by the eval only once the persistent case graph lands (Phase 6 Slice D);
it derives purely from the planted account fields (prior_review_count,
account_status) and the published casegraph policy.
Subjects are keyed by role_in_ring (seed-stable), never by uid.

basis.expand_hop: The controller shares a planted device with the employee cutout and the trust intermediary (ground_truth.shared_devices group 1) and controls wallets with planted flows into the ring, so hop 1 must discover new accounts (continue); the cap then bounds the walk at hop 2 (stop_cap).
basis.second_advisory: Only the trust subject has an RFI on file (SIM-RFI-0001); the advisory matcher is event-triggered on RFI text, so with no document there can be no match.
basis.re_rfi: No RFI on file, so the decision cannot apply.
basis.sufficiency: Every planted account grounds at least a registration timeline event; the policy floor is 1 event with a resolved subject.
basis.sar_bar: Per the committed rubric key (sar_rubric_gold.json) the controller's planted evidence grounds all eight FinCEN rubric elements (sanctioned exposure, device/KYC ring, remarks, structured flows), so the Critic loop converges: clears_bar.
basis.recidivism_surfaced: prior_review_count is planted 0-1 for non-recidivist roles and status is active -- below the casegraph policy (>=3 prior reviews or retain_monitor).

basis.expand_hop: The trust shares planted devices with the controller+employee and with SHELL_HK, and its controller wallet runs the planted bidirectional layering flows with SHELL_NZ -- hop 1 must discover new accounts (continue); the cap bounds the walk at hop 2 (stop_cap).
basis.second_advisory: The trust's RFI narrative is planted to trigger the Iran-oil advisory (keyword + semantic + structured corroboration), and the case's structured corroborators (ring jurisdictions, watchlist alias, on-chain exposure) let further advisories pass the corroboration gate -- so at least two matches survive and policy surfaces the runner-up. The runner-up's identity follows the matcher's published deterministic rank key (signal count, then matched terms, then corroborators, then semantic, then id) over the 4-advisory corpus: FIN-2019-A006. Confirmed by direct computation; the primary consumed by the SAR is FIN-2025-A002 either way.
basis.re_rfi: The generator plants exactly two false claims in SIM-RFI-0001 (ground_truth.rfi_lies: C2, C4), each with rebutting evidence rows, and the contradiction eval pins their adjudication as 'contradicted'; policy recommends a follow-up at >=1 contradicted claim, drafted never sent.
basis.sufficiency: Planted account with a full timeline; above the 1-event floor.
basis.sar_bar: Per sar_rubric_gold.json the trust's evidence grounds all eight rubric elements, so the Critic loop converges: clears_bar.
basis.recidivism_surfaced: prior_review_count is planted 0-1 for non-recidivist roles (the trust's draw is 1) and status is active -- below the casegraph policy.

basis.expand_hop: The red-herring account shares a planted device with SHELL_AE and SHELL_TR (ground_truth.shared_devices group 2), so hop 1 discovers those accounts (continue); the cap bounds the walk at hop 2 (stop_cap). The internal 'do-not-block' tag is FLAGGED for review and must not alter the walk.
basis.second_advisory: No RFI on file -- no advisory can match.
basis.re_rfi: No RFI on file, so the decision cannot apply.
basis.sufficiency: Planted account with a timeline; above the 1-event floor.
basis.sar_bar: The plant is deliberately sparse: no RFI, no advisory, and no flow path into the sanctioned corridor (the account is absent from ground_truth.sanctioned_exposure_uids), so per sar_rubric_gold.json only 5/8 rubric elements are groundable -- the Critic cannot converge: human_review.
basis.recidivism_surfaced: prior_review_count planted 0-1, status active -- below the casegraph policy.

basis.expand_hop: Noise accounts are planted with NO ring linkage: a unique KYC document each, only their own unshared device, and transactions whose counterparties are fresh TRON addresses absent from the controller map -- so counterparty discovery cannot resolve an account and hop 1 discovers nothing. Policy stops on the exhausted frontier (provably lossless: the skipped hop would start from an empty frontier).
basis.second_advisory: No RFI on file -- no advisory can match.
basis.re_rfi: No RFI on file, so the decision cannot apply.
basis.sufficiency: Even a noise account grounds registration/transaction timeline events; above the 1-event floor.
basis.sar_bar: Per sar_rubric_gold.json a noise account grounds only 4/8 rubric elements (no exposure, no ring linkage, no RFI/advisory) -- the Critic cannot converge: human_review.
basis.recidivism_surfaced: prior_review_count planted 0-1, status active -- below the casegraph policy.

basis.expand_hop: The recidivist shares a planted device with the employee cutout and the reused-KYC second employee (ground_truth.shared_devices group 4), and his planted 4.85M 'aggregation fee - partner share' withdrawal lands on SHELL_CN's controller wallet -- hop 1 must discover new accounts (continue); the cap bounds the walk at hop 2 (stop_cap).
basis.second_advisory: No RFI on file -- no advisory can match.
basis.re_rfi: No RFI on file, so the decision cannot apply.
basis.sufficiency: Planted account with a timeline; above the 1-event floor.
basis.sar_bar: The recidivist's planted evidence (shared device, watchlist alias SDN-0002, betraying remark) grounds the who/what/when/where and network elements, but he is absent from ground_truth.sanctioned_exposure_uids (no planted flow path into the sanctioned corridor) and has no RFI or advisory -- so the on-chain-evidence and why elements are ungroundable and the Critic cannot converge: human_review.
basis.recidivism_surfaced: THE plant this capability exists for: prior_review_count=5 and account_status=retain_monitor ('cleared five prior reviews'), both above/at the casegraph policy thresholds -- recidivism must be surfaced at case open.
